summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of BarberosControl landing page. All core functionality working correctly including navigation, hero section, carousel, features, benefits, CTA sections, and footer. Mobile responsiveness verified.
passed_tests: Navigation logo with 'os' in orange styling
Navigation 'Probar Gratis' button redirects to WhatsApp with correct URL
Navigation 'Iniciar Sesión' link redirects to app.barberoscontrol.com
Hero section displays title, description and CTA buttons correctly
Hero 'Probar Gratis' button redirects to WhatsApp
Hero 'Iniciar Sesión' button redirects to app.barberoscontrol.com
Screenshots carousel displays correctly with marquee animation
Features section shows all 6 feature cards in bento grid layout
Benefits section shows all 4 benefit cards
Final CTA section has working WhatsApp and Login buttons
Footer displays logo and working links
Mobile responsiveness - all sections adapt correctly
Mobile navigation and buttons remain functional
All external links have target='_blank' for proper new tab opening
All buttons are clickable and properly styled
Dark theme with orange accent color (#f97316) implemented correctly
